source.body_text_sample:

Career Opportunities
Home  Career Opportunities

Thank you for your interest in joining our company. We are currently hiring for one open position. If you are interested, please:

Email your application to job2125@mrf.com.
Include your resume and a one-page cover letter or a link to a short self-introduction video (under 3 minutes) that highlights how your skills align with the desired qualifications listed in the job posting.
We appreciate all applications, but please note that only candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.


Sales Representative – Technology Solutions for Government

About Us
MRF Geosystems Corporation (MRF) provides innovative technology solutions that enhance safety, efficiency, and data management for municipalities, government agencies, and enterprise customers. With decades of experience delivering GIS, safety, enforcement, and monitoring platforms, MRF partners closely with government organizations to modernize their operations and deliver measurable results.

Position Overview
We’re looking for a Sales Representative with a passion for technology, problem-solving, and public service. The ideal candidate will have a post-secondary education in business or a related field, combined with strong communication and relationship-building skills. You’ll work directly with municipal, provincial, and institutional clients to introduce, demonstrate, and deliver MRF’s suite of technology solution
